data.content: Planned exploration support as a cohesive built-in workflow/profile change. The key implementation constraint is that the current built-in compatibility profiles are split between the Loom bundle and the legacy static profile normalizer; exploration requires updating or consolidating that path before the new states can work reliably. No child knots were created. Main execution steps: add `kno new -e`, add the exploration action/profile to the built-in workflow bundle, make built-in profile loading accept the new state graph, add the shipped-with-related-knot guard, then cover CLI/runtime/app transitions with tests and finish with `make sanity`.
